panels.description: The percentage of sessions using the selected browser.
panels.title: Adoption

panels.description: The number of sessions for the selected period and browser.
panels.title: Sessions

panels.description: The Success Rate measures player reliability as the ratio of START to ERROR events, excluding failures caused by blocked reasons,  unsupported DRM errors or connection errors.
panels.title: Success Rate

panels.description: Error Type Breakdown for the selected browser and time range.
panels.title: Error Type Breakdown

panels.description: This panel shows the relative distribution of error types for each operating system version.
panels.title: Error Type Distribution by OS version

panels.description: The median quality of experience loading time, i.e., how long the user perceives the video to load.
panels.title: Perceived delay

panels.description: Distribution of sessions across perceived loading times, capped at the 95th percentile to exclude outliers.
panels.title: Perceived delay historgram

list.definition:
{
  "find": "terms",
  "field": "session.device.model",
  "query": "event_name:START AND session.player.platform:(Android OR Apple) AND session.player.platform:$platform",
  "size": 10,
  "orderBy": "doc_count"
}
list.label: Device
list.name: device
list.query:
{
  "find": "terms",
  "field": "session.device.model",
  "query": "event_name:START AND session.player.platform:(Android OR Apple) AND session.player.platform:$platform",
  "size": 10,
  "orderBy": "doc_count"
}

infinityQuery.uql:
parse-json
| extend formatted = iff(value == "*", "*", strcat("\"", value, "\""))
| project formatted
